overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through an abandoned urban commercial district in Cyberpunk 2077's Night City during dusk. The player walks through a desolate plaza featuring the Grand Imperia Mall, a neon-lit gas station with large digital screens, and debris-filled parking lots, transitioning through back alleys toward a gated industrial area. The scene features prominent pink and blue neon lighting against a darkening sky with no visible NPCs or active traffic.

events.description: moving from open plaza area toward gas station canopy
entering area with stronger pink neon illumination from gas station

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through abandoned commercial plaza toward a gas station with bright pink neon signage

entered.detail: large orange neon sign with metal framework support structure
red and yellow gas station canopy with pink neon lotus flower sign on top
tall palm trees silhouetted against the dusk sky
modern angled LED street lamps illuminating the area
tall modern glass and steel skyscrapers with illuminated windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the Grand Imperia Mall sign in a desolate urban plaza at dusk. The camera moves forward toward a gas station with distinctive pink neon lighting, passing palm trees and modern street lamps. The atmosphere is quiet and abandoned, with no visible pedestrians or traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station forecourt with digital billboard

events.description: moving under the gas station canopy into sheltered area
turning left to circle back around the gas station structure

agents.ego_description: circling the gas station forecourt, passing under the canopy with large digital screens displaying animated content

entered.detail: large digital billboard mounted on gas station pillar displaying anime character animation
thick cylindrical support pillars with blue and yellow color scheme
illuminated pink neon lotus flower sign on gas station roof

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the gas station canopy, entering a space dominated by pink neon lighting and large digital screens showing animated content. The Grand Imperia Mall sign falls behind as the camera circles the station pillars, with the lighting shifting to artificial neon tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned parking lot with wrecked vehicles

events.description: exiting gas station shelter into open parking lot with debris
weaving between abandoned and wrecked vehicles in the lot

agents.ego_description: navigating through a debris-filled parking lot with abandoned cars and wrecked vehicles scattered throughout

entered.detail: rusted and damaged abandoned vehicles scattered across the lot
heavily damaged dark colored van with broken windows
scattered trash and rubble piles on the asphalt surface

segments.scene_description: Leaving the gas station behind, the camera enters a wide open parking lot littered with abandoned vehicles and debris. The Grand Imperia Mall sign reappears on the left as the camera weaves between wrecked cars, with the sky fully visible above and natural dusk light mixing with distant neon.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with traffic signals

events.description: approaching paved street intersection from parking lot debris
approaching red traffic light at intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching and crossing a street intersection with active traffic signals and street lamps

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light mounted on tall pole
illuminated modern street lamp post
faded white painted lines marking pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the parking lot to a paved street intersection, approaching a red traffic light. Crosswalk markings become visible on the asphalt as the camera moves under street lamps, with the background dominated by the illuminated city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with concrete barriers and utility buildings

events.description: moving from street into narrower alleyway lined with concrete barriers
passing through area with increased vegetation and utility structures

agents.ego_description: walking along a narrow path lined with teal concrete barriers and palm trees, passing utility buildings and trash bins

entered.detail: teal colored concrete Jersey barriers lining the path
small dark wooden utility structure with illuminated window
red and green waste containers and garbage bags

segments.scene_description: Moving off the main street into a narrower alleyway, the camera passes teal concrete barriers and dense palm trees. A small utility building with a lit window stands on the left, while trash bins and debris line the path. The space feels more enclosed than the previous open areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path leading to metal gate structure

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete to dirt trail
approaching large metal industrial gate structure

agents.ego_description: approaching a large metal gate structure at the end of a dirt path, passing an abandoned white van

entered.detail: large industrial metal framework gate with horizontal beams spanning across the path
white van parked on the dirt path with doors closed
unpaved dirt and gravel surface with scattered puddles

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to an unpaved dirt path leading toward a large industrial metal gate structure. An abandoned white van sits in the middle of the path as the camera approaches the gate, with palm trees now distant on the left and the lighting becoming darker and more subdued.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban plaza that transitions from the open architecture of a shopping district into the artificial glow of a gas station and finally into a debris-strewn parking lot. It begins by moving away from the Grand Imperia Mall sign toward a gas station, passing silent palm trees and street lamps under a darkening dusk sky. As the camera glides under the station canopy, the natural light fades, replaced by an immersive environment of vivid pink neon and flickering digital screens. The scene then opens back up as the camera leaves the artificial shelter, weaving through a wide expanse of abandoned vehicles and wreckage. Finally, the perspective shifts to reveal the Grand Imperia Mall sign once more in the distance, where the remaining natural twilight blends with the distant neon glow of the city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, illuminated city intersection into a secluded and darkening industrial perimeter. It begins by crossing a paved street intersection under the glow of street lamps, where white crosswalk markings lead the eye toward a towering, illuminated city skyline. As the camera moves off the main road, the open vista narrows into a confined alleyway lined with teal concrete barriers, dense palm trees, and debris-strewn paths. The scene then shifts from the paved alley to an unpaved dirt track, passing a solitary abandoned white van as the lighting becomes increasingly subdued. Finally, the camera approaches a large industrial metal gate, leaving the city lights behind for a desolate, shadowed entrance.
